This bundle is listed for a $3,799 MSRP, but can more often be found starting around $3,499 at Amazon, where it’s currently discounted to $2,899. You’re getting the best price of 2026 so far during this event with $1,125 savings off the going rate, which is only beaten out by the $2,299 and $2,199 rates we last saw during Black Friday and Cyber Monday. You can find the standalone power station down at $1,499 shipped right now (with an extra $200 automatically deducted in your cart), or head below to browse this sale’s entire lineup of deals.
